# atlassian_jira_permission_scheme (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a Jira Cloud permission scheme by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "atlassian_jira_permission_scheme" "example" {
  name = "Default Permission Scheme"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the permission scheme to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the permission scheme.
- `id` (String) The ID of the permission scheme.
